caption: The video depicts a medical simulation scenario, likely part of a training exercise for healthcare professionals. Four individuals, dressed in surgical scrubs and wearing hairnets and masks, are gathered around a patient lying on an operating table. The setting appears to be a simulated operating room, equipped with medical instruments and equipment. The participants seem focused and engaged, possibly performing a procedure or discussing the patient's condition. The text "Day 5" and "Sim Week" suggests that this is part of a week-long simulation program designed to enhance clinical skills and teamwork among medical students or residents. The atmosphere is serious and professional, emphasizing the importance of the training experience.
